meta.name: Magneta — setFeeExempt LPModule (Cronos backfill)
meta.description: Mark the newly-deployed LPModule (0xDe24…890D) fee-exempt on MagnetaSwap so LP ops dispatched through the Gateway don't pay the 0.30% protocol fee on the internal pool side. Owner of MagnetaSwap is the in-house Safe 0x40ea…b297, so the deployer EOA cannot run this directly during deployCronosBackfill.ts — execute via execBatch.ts. Last step to bring Cronos to 11/11 contracts and full operational state.
